    213 -    assert "last_materialized_hash" not in sql
    214 -    assert "conflict_reason" not in sql
    214 +    assert _LEGACY_PLAN_MATERIALIZED_HASH_COLUMN not in columns
    215 +    assert _LEGACY_PLAN_CONFLICT_COLUMN not in columns
    216 +    assert _LEGACY_PLAN_MATERIALIZED_HASH_COLUMN not in sql
    217 +    assert _LEGACY_PLAN_CONFLICT_COLUMN not in sql
    218      assert "parse_error" in sql
    216 -    assert "'conflict'" not in sql
    219 +    assert f"'{_LEGACY_PLAN_CONFLICT_STATE}'" not in sql
    220
